While the move is notable, chasing a 4% single-day gain without a specific fundamental catalyst would be speculative pile-on behavior per signal quality rules. Monitor for a pullback and clearer catalyst before entering.

However, entering after a 6%+ gap-up without confirmed fundamental news is high-risk and violates the no-speculative-pile-on rule. Adding to watchlist for monitoring with a note on the catalyst.
